name: functions-tree
description: GitHub PR ページ上で関数の依存関係グラフを表示する Chrome 拡張 (MV3)

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run bundle:content && npm run bundle:mermaid-view && npm run bundle:sw && npm run bundle:options && mkdir -p dist && npm run copy-static && npm run copy-wasm
scripts.pretest: esbuild src/background/analyzer-core.ts --bundle --format=esm --external:module --external:fs --external:path --external:web-tree-sitter --outfile=dist-test/analyzer-core.mjs && esbuild src/content/mermaid-source.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist-test/mermaid-source.mjs && esbuild src/background/diff-lines.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist-test/diff-lines.mjs && esbuild src/shared/review-drafts.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist-test/review-drafts.mjs
